company_description: Elastio provides a ransomware recovery assurance platform for cloud and on-premises environments, validating backups, detecting ransomware, and maintaining clean recovery points. filter_reason: Real cybersecurity SaaS startup. $18M Series A, strong investor base (Bain Capital Ventures), real product with major cloud platform integrations.

company_description: Chef Robotics builds AI-enabled robotic systems for automated meal assembly in food manufacturing. hiring_signals: Yes — actively hiring. Raised $43.1M Series A in March 2025 to accelerate deployments.
recent_news: Raised $43.1M Series A in March 2025 ($20.6M equity + $22.5M equipment financing) led by Avataar Ventures. Total capital raised ~$65.6M. Expanding to UK market in 2025. 44M+ servings produced.
filter_reason: Real AI robotics startup. $65M+ raised, Series A, strong commercial traction, expanding internationally. High-growth company.
